name: How much money can I get for falling off a ladder at work and breaking my leg?
description: $50K-$200K typical; depends on injury/wages—get free eval from comp lawyer.

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for falling off a ladder at work and breaking my leg?

acceptedAnswer.text: $50K-$200K typical; depends on injury/wages—get free eval from comp lawyer.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Settlements average $50K-$200K+** depending on injury severity, lost wages, age, and state caps; back fractures often $100K+.[7]

Utah/Idaho comp pays 66% wages (max ~$1K/wk), full medical, plus permanency ratings.

- Mild: $20K-$50K; surgery/permanent disability: $150K+.
- Multi-party sites add third-party lawsuits.

Get free case value from attorney using medicals/earnings data.

Values rise with strong evidence and legal negotiation.
